Check for hyperedge-based logical and functional dependencies in file 'ticdata2000_preprocessed.csv'

----------------------------------------------------
Data                  | ticdata2000_preprocessed.csv
Hyperedge file        | tic_hyperedges_top_7.csv    
No. of rows           | 5220                        
No. of columns        | 86                          
No. of hyperedges     | 67                          
No. of LD occurrences | 1454                        
No. of unique LDs     | 878                         
No. of FD occurrences | 60                          
No. of unique FDs     | 32                          
----------------------------------------------------


Logical dependency interpretation
----------------------------------------
Condition | Implication               
--------------------------------------
Q = 0     | Functional dependency (FD)
0 < Q < 1 | Logical dependency (LD)   
Q = 1     | No dependency             
Lower Q   | Stronger dependency       
--------------------------------------

Note: Functional dependencies are a special case of logical dependencies.
